caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair styled in a high bun wears black headphones and a black t-shirt with a circular white logo. She is positioned in a studio setting, facing left toward a black microphone on a stand. To her left is a screen displaying the word "Johnson" in red text, and behind her is a yellow vertical stripe against a white wall. On the right side of the scene, a black wall features the red and white text "BOSS TALK 101" and "By: 11 logo Studio." A smaller circular logo that says "PODCAST" is also visible on the white wall. Across the sequence, the woman remains in the same position and posture, staring ahead with a neutral expression, while the camera maintains a steady medium shot of the scene.
